0.0.6.description:
# Dragon Quest IX - Testing Release (Version 0.0.6)

**This is a testing release. Expect things to break unexpectedly and do not rely on it being complety stable.**

## Bugs fixed

(None known)

## Added or Updated Features

* Boss Keys: The game now manages progression by using items known as "Boss Keys". You can try to fight a boss without it, but this will activate *Punishment Mode* - good luck trying to beat a boss with that :smiling_imp:
* Some refactoring in the background
0.0.6.title: Version 0.0.6

0.1.0.description:
# Dragon Quest IX - Somewhat Stable (Beta) Release (Version 0.1.0)

**This is a beta release. Things can possibly break, though the core gameplay should run normally.**

Download this version [here](https://github.com/kid2407/ArchipelagoDQIX/releases/tag/0.1.0)

New to the game? Check out the [FAQ](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1427594624389742716/1491731616068800543)
## Bugs fixed

* Game no longer softlocks when a team member dies while punishment mode is active
* Removed a non-existing location

## Added or Updated Features

* Some refactoring in the background, most noteably now using RuleBuilder
* New: Alternative goals! There are now three possible goals you can select from when setting up a game / configuring your YAML:
  * Defeat Corvus (Default)
  * Defeat Greygnarl
  * Defeat Master of Nu'un
* Options! There are now two Options you can set to configure your run:
  * Goal: Choose your target end boss, allowing for shorter runs
  * Filler Amount: You can now adjust how many percent of items should be filler, which atm means gold and xp rewards
0.1.0.title: Version 0.1.0

0.1.1.description:
# Dragon Quest IX - Beta Release (Version 0.1.1)

**This is a beta release. Things can possibly break, though the core gameplay should run normally.**

New to the game? Check out the [FAQ](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1427594624389742716/1491731616068800543)
## Bugs fixed

* Removed some non-existing locations
* Updated / corrected special location rules
* Fixed logic bug causing Morag to not be in-logic, leading to unbeatable seeds

## Added or Updated Features

* Added more test, to catch logic and coding errors
* Boss Keys for non-relevant bosses do not appear in the item pool anymore
0.1.1.title: Version 0.1.1
